summary: Parallel review: FAIL (4 critical, 3 warning, 9 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs:304 — `buildSpecBrief` hand-keys a `bodies` map; backlog: parity test asserting `Object.keys(bodies)` ⊇ `PRD_SECTIONS`.
🟡 bin/lib/spec.mjs:42 — `default: "TBD"` in `defaultSectionBody` silently swallows new sections; backlog: throw or add exhaustiveness test.
- Prior round's 🔴 (`run.mjs:933` 2-section spec contradicting `validateSpecFile`) is resolved.
🔴 bin/lib/spec.mjs:57 — `sections` parameter on `buildMinimalSpec` has no caller-side override; drop it and reference `PRD_SECTIONS` directly.
🔴 bin/lib/spec.mjs:81 — `sections` parameter on `buildSpecTemplate` has no caller-side override; drop it and reference `PRD_SECTIONS` directly.
🟡 bin/lib/spec.mjs:42 — `default:` branch of `defaultSectionBody` is unreachable once `sections` is no longer pluggable.
